name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages, state



(* --state variables
participants : [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> {"Init", "Voting", "Voted", "Committed", "Aborted"}, vote |-> {"None", "VoteYes", "VoteNo"}]]
coordinator : [state : {"Init", "WaitingForVotes", "Committed", "Aborted"}, votes : <<>>]
messages : <<>>
*)

(* --initial state
Init == 
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
  /\ coordinator = [state : "Init", votes : <<>>]
  /\ messages = <<>>
*)

(* --next-state relation
Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ participants[i].state = "Init"
       /\ participants[i].state' = "Voting"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ participants[i].state = "Voting"
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type : "VoteYes", to : "Coordinator"])
       /\ participants[i].state' = "Voted"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ participants[i].state = "Voting"
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type : "VoteNo", to : "Coordinator"])
       /\ participants[i].state' = "Voted"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type : "Commit", to : "All"])
       /\ coordinator.state' = "Committed"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type : "Abort", to : "All"])
       /\ coordinator.state' = "Aborted"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ participants[i].state = "Voted"
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type : "Commit", to : "All"])
       /\ participants[i].state' = "Committed"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ participants[i].state = "Voted"
       /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type : "Abort", to : "All"])
       /\ participants[i].state' = "Aborted"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ participants[i].state = "Committed"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ participants[i].state = "Aborted"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ coordinator.state = "Committed"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
       /\ messages = <<>>
       /\ coordinator.state = "Aborted"
       /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, messages>>
*)

(* --type invariant
TypeOK == 
  /\ participants \in [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> {"Init", "Voting", "Voted", "Committed", "Aborted"}, vote |-> {"None", "VoteYes", "VoteNo"}]]
  /\ coordinator \in [state : {"Init", "WaitingForVotes", "Committed", "Aborted"}, votes : <<>>]
  /\ messages \in <<>>
*)

(* --specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>
*)

(* --TLC configuration
SPECIFICATION Spec
INVARIANT TypeOK
*)

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>>

(* Invariant: no two philosophers share a fork *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free"} \cup 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE num + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE flag + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE maxFlag + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF flag = 0 THEN 0 ELSE maxNum + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [k \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][k], counts[m][k])]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

====
